planChange.title: Subscription Plan Changed
planChange.message: Your subscription plan has been successfully changed. Details below:

subscriptionRenewal.title: Subscription Renewed Successfully
subscriptionRenewal.message: Your subscription has been successfully renewed. Thank you for continuing to use our service!

subscriptionExtension.title: Subscription Extended
subscriptionExtension.message: Your subscription has been extended. Your subscription period has been updated.

cancelled.title: Subscription Cancelled
cancelled.message: Your subscription has been cancelled. If you wish to continue using our service, please contact us to reactivate your subscription.

paused.title: Subscription Paused
paused.message: Your subscription has been paused. You can reactivate your subscription at any time from your subscription management page.

resumed.title: Subscription Resumed
resumed.message: Your subscription has been resumed. You can now continue using all features of your subscription plan.

created.title: Addon Package Added
created.message: A new addon package has been added to your account. Your limits have been increased.

updated.title: Addon Package Updated
updated.message: Your addon package has been updated. Limits have been adjusted.

deleted.title: Addon Package Deleted
deleted.message: An addon package has been removed from your account. Your limits have been reduced.

activated.title: Addon Package Activated
activated.message: Your addon package has been activated. Limits have been applied.

deactivated.title: Addon Package Deactivated
deactivated.message: Your addon package has been deactivated. Limits have been removed.

addonChange.createdMessage: You can use these additional limits now.
addonChange.deletedMessage: Please ensure your current counts do not exceed the new limits.
addonChange.updatedMessage: Changes have been applied to your account.
